item.title: Quick Shop Test for Simple Stakes
item.description: A quick shop test shows whether simple stakes are worth the effort in the shop.

item.title: Axe Forged From Steel Cable
item.description: A calm look at forging an axe from steel cable, highlighting shaping, heat, and traditional metalworking technique.

media:content.media:title: Axe Forged From Steel Cable
media:content.media:description: A calm look at forging an axe from steel cable, highlighting shaping, heat, and traditional metalworking technique.

item.title: Forged Hook With Shelf for Everyday Carry
item.description: A handmade forged hook with a top shelf for keys, wallets, and more. A practical shop project focused on shaping, fit, and clean metalwork.

media:content.media:title: Forged Hook With Shelf for Everyday Carry
media:content.media:description: A handmade forged hook with a top shelf for keys, wallets, and more. A practical shop project focused on shaping, fit, and clean metalwork.

item.title: Plain Bar to a Handy Shop Tool
item.description: See how a plain bar turns into a shop tool you’d actually use.

media:content.media:description: See how a plain bar turns into a shop tool you’d actually use.

item.title: A Simple Forge Project for the Shop
item.description: A simple forge project that solves a real shop problem, showing practical blacksmithing and metalworking craft.

item.title: The Power of the Forge

item.title: Forging a Braided Twist Handle
item.description: A blacksmithing project focused on forging a braided twist handle with careful shaping, heat, and traditional shop technique.

item.title: How to Make a Fireplace Poker
item.description: A calm, step-by-step look at forging a fireplace poker from scratch, with focus on shaping, heat, and traditional shop technique.

item.title: Using a Ball-Peen Hammer Correctly
item.description: A clear look at proper ball-peen hammer use in the forge, focused on control, technique, and practical metalworking skill.

item.title: Forging Candlesticks in the Forge
item.description: A blacksmithing project focused on shaping candlesticks with heat, hammer control, and careful metalwork.
